title: delphinium intermedium var. speciosum
intro: Delphinium intermedium var. speciosum, also known as the tall delphinium, is a plant species in the buttercup family, characterized by its tall spikes of showy, fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Delphinium intermedium var. speciosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat various health conditions.
